summary: Implemented ExecutionMode enum with 4 fixed preset tables (multi_agents, multi_claude_agents, claude_subagents, mainthread). Updated get_executor_chain() to use preset-based resolution from workflow.mode config field. Created 4 Claude Code agent definitions and 2 Bash hook scripts. Added 29 tests: 8 unit (preset table lookup, TOML parsing, default mode) and 21 integration (agent frontmatter validation, hook script allow/block behavior). Updated config template to show workflow.mode format.
